_note: CA GOV § 11120 — Stage 2 definition data. Definitions operate at two levels here: an article-level definition of 'state body' that applies to all 13 sections in Article 9, and section-level definitions scoped to individual sections.

article_9_definitions.value: As used in this article, 'state body' does not include any of the following: [courts, local agencies under Brown Act, legislature, UC/CSU governing boards, etc.]
article_9_definitions._note: Article-scoped — provided as context to every section in Article 9 during Stage 3 summarization and Stage 4 analysis.

section_11123.2_definitions.value: "Teleconference" means a meeting of a state body, the members of which are at different locations, connected by electronic means, through either audio or video, or both.
"Teleconference location" means any location where a member of a state body participates in a teleconference meeting.
"Remote location" means a location from which a member of a state body participates in a meeting other than the primary physical location designated in the agenda.

_conflict_note: The term 'teleconference' is defined in multiple sections (11123.2, 11123.5, 11123.5_dup) with slightly different language tailored to each section's scope. The conflict detection system identifies these as non-conflicting: each definition is scoped to its own section and the definitions are functionally equivalent at the section level.
